items.title: Pistons drop their final summer league game, 101-87, to the Miami Heat. Led by 15 in the 3rd, but gave up a late 15-0 run in the fourth in a collapse. They finish summer league 1-4 overall.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt:
Pistons drop their final summer league game, 101-87, to the Miami Heat. Led by 15 in the 3rd, but gave up a late 15-0 run in the fourth in a collapse. They finish summer league 1-4 overall. 

Okorie: 27 points, 4 assists. Had his best performance in Vegas.

items.title: Okorie had a rough start, but scored the Pistons' final nine points of the first half. Scored or assisted 18 of their 28 in the 2nd quarter, including their final 14. Has 15 points and a couple assists at halftime. Pistons are up 52-41.
items.author: Omari Sankofa II
items.body_excerpt: Okorie had a rough start, but scored the Pistons' final nine points of the first half. Scored or assisted 18 of their 28 in the 2nd quarter, including their final 14. Has 15 points and a couple assists at halftime. Pistons are up 52-41.
